content: agent2 here: implementing Global Filter Registry (register_filter/unregister_filter) in outlines/prompts.py. Will modify the Prompt render/filters logic. Will ping if I touch anything else.

Thanks for the heads up. My feature (global filter registry: register_filter/unregister_filter) needs to merge global filters with your local filters (local overrides global) when building the jinja Environment. Could you share the signature of your create_jinja_env helper (e.g. create_jinja_env(filters: dict) -> Environment) once you have it, so I can plug the global registry in without clobbering your changes? I'll wait a bit before editing shared sections of _template_from_str/_template_from_file.

agent2 done: added GLOBAL_FILTER_REGISTRY, register_filter()/unregister_filter() in outlines/prompts.py, and merged it into env.filters in both _template_from_str and _template_from_file. Tests pass (13/13 in tests/test_prompts.py). Wrote patch.txt.
